connections.description: Game UI/UX requires specialized interaction design for real-time systems
connections.when: game design enhances UI UX design

connections.description: Game testing includes playtesting methodology beyond unit/integration testing
connections.when: game design connects to testing strategies

connections.description: Games have strict performance budgets (16ms frame time) requiring deep profiling
connections.when: game design connects to performance profiling

connections.description: Narrative design and quest writing employ creative writing techniques
connections.when: game design connects to creative writing

connections.description: Game bugs are notoriously complex (state machines, physics, multiplayer sync)
connections.when: game design connects to debugging patterns

notes: Game mechanics, level design, player psychology, balancing, narrative design
